description: AI-native decision support for revenue-aware customer operations

dev_units.name: ticket_risk_analyzer
dev_units.description: Analyzes support tickets for escalation risk, churn intent, urgency, executive dissatisfaction, renewal timing, vendor-switching language, and revenue impact.

dev_units.name: next_best_action_generator
dev_units.description: Takes ticket analysis output and generates priority, next-best actions, stakeholders to involve, escalation recommendation, and executive-ready reply draft.

dev_units.name: support_dashboard
dev_units.description: Streamlit UI that connects ticket analysis and action generation into a demoable end-to-end workflow.
